name_en: Model: 666262 🇰🇷MCM🇰🇷 Summer New Arrival, same as Zhao Liying's Camera Bag 📷, classic print, fits PLUS and MAX size phones. Adjustable strap, can be worn over the shoulder or as a waist bag. Dimensions: 17x12x7cm
